---
title: "Instructor Only: Scatterplots, Smoothing, And Groups Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
davis <- read_csv("data/real/davis_height_weight.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

weight_data <- davis |>
  filter(!is.na(weight_kg), !is.na(reported_weight_kg), !is.na(sex))

ggplot(weight_data, aes(x = weight_kg, y = reported_weight_kg, color = sex)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Measured And Reported Weight",
    x = "Measured weight (kg)",
    y = "Reported weight (kg)",
    color = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
